title: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Senior Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Proficient in React, Node.js, and cloud technologies.

title: Data Scientist
summary: Data Scientist with expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and statistical modeling. Experienced in building production ML pipelines.

title: Frontend Developer
summary: Frontend Developer specializing in React and Vue.js with a passion for creating intuitive user interfaces and responsive designs.

title: DevOps Engineer
summary: DevOps Engineer with expertise in containerization, cloud infrastructure, and automation. Experienced in managing production systems.

title: Product Manager
summary: Product Manager with 8+ years leading cross-functional teams to deliver user-centric products. Skilled in strategy, execution, and analytics.

title: Full Stack Developer
summary: Full Stack Developer skilled in React, Node.js, and Python. Built and deployed multiple web applications from concept to production.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
summary: ML Engineer experienced in designing and deploying machine learning models at scale. Expertise in NLP and computer vision applications.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
summary: Cybersecurity Analyst skilled in threat detection, vulnerability assessment, and incident response. Certified in CEH and CISSP.
